SEARCH
Package com.group02.tars.service

Class ServiceRegistry

java.lang.Object
com.group02.tars.service.ServiceRegistry
public class ServiceRegistry extends Object
Servlet-context scoped holder for storage and service instances.

The registry creates one shared FileStorage instance and wires all service implementations to it. API servlets obtain the registry through from(ServletContext) during initialization.

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static ServiceRegistry from(jakarta.servlet.ServletContext context) throws IOException
      Returns the shared registry stored in the servlet context, creating it on first use.
      Parameters:
      context - servlet context used as registry storage
      Returns:
      shared service registry
      Throws:
      IOException - if registry creation fails
